mapper.select: select id, title, message_type, receiver_type, send_status, send_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from admin_messages where id = #{id} and deleted = false

select count(1) from admin_messages
and deleted = false
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and send_status = #{sendStatus}
mapper.update: update admin_messages set title = #{title}, message_type = #{messageType}, receiver_type = #{receiverType}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, send_time = #{sendTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
